Changelog

Release notes for every version of Loom.

v0.1.0

June 24, 2026 — Initial release

feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
feature
  • Prompt-first interactive CLI — type natural language, no commands required
  • Multi-provider support: Ollama, OpenAI, OpenRouter, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq
  • Auto-routing — Loom picks the right model based on your prompt
  • 6 agent modes: Plan, Build, Review, Debug, Research, Test
  • File tools: read, write, edit, patch, list, search
  • Shell execution with configurable safety gates
  • Session persistence — auto-saves conversations
  • Workspace memory — notes, summaries, project context
  • MCP server support for tool extensibility
  • Plugin system — custom tools via JS/ESM plugins
  • Codebase indexing — symbol lookup and dependency analysis
  • Configurable routing, model selection, and safety settings
  • Tab completion and command history in REPL
  • Multi-platform: Windows, macOS, Linux
  • Ink-based TUI with Welcome screen, Slash popup, and Command palette
  • esbuild bundle for fast startup and SEA binary support
  • Cross-platform CI: GitHub Actions with 3 OS × 3 Node versions
  • Install scripts for npm, pnpm, yarn, Homebrew (coming soon), and standalone binary

View the full commit history on GitHub

Loom— Local-first AI coding agent
